steps.assistant_text: -O1 island. Levers: fused '(head = load) == 0 || count >= cap' guard keeps the load reg live across beq; NESTED-IF TAIL instead of early return (restores or a0,t6 jal-delay head reuse — early-return vs nested-if flips uopt's home-reload CSE across the guard); register res -> s0.
